hero.title: Daga buƙatar samun dama ga jama'a repo
hero.lead: IATF tana taimaka wa ƙungiyoyi, ƙungiyoyi da daidaikun mutane juya ainihin buƙatun samun dama zuwa ayyukan buɗe tushen jama'a.
support: Ana buga ayyukan da aka karɓa a cikin ƙungiyar IATF GitHub a ƙarƙashin lasisin copyleft kuma injiniyan da ke da alhakin ya haɓaka a bainar jama'a.

header.title: Hanya mai sauƙi ga jama'a don software mai sauƙi

paragraphs: Ta hanyar fom, kowa na iya gabatar da matsalar samun dama ga IATF. Idan ƙungiyar za ta iya ɗaukar ta, za a buɗe maɓallin GitHub na jama'a don aikin.
Kowane aikin da aka karɓa yana da gidan jama'a a bayyane don lambar, batutuwa, takaddara, da saki, tare da ci gaban da aka jagoranta a buɗe ta injiniyan da ke da alhakin.

terms.definition: Amincewa da manufa da kuma yiwuwar aiki

header.title: Yadda yake aiki
header.intro: Samfurin ya kasance da gangan kaɗan don haka hanyar jama'a tana da sauƙin bi.

steps.title: An gabatar da buƙata
paragraphs: Ƙungiya, ƙungiya, ko mutum zai iya gabatar da buƙata bisa ga ainihin buƙatar samun dama.
Ana iya fara buƙatun ta hanyar yanar gizo, ta hanyar imel zuwa contact@iatf.cc, ko kuma ta hanyar Discord.

steps.title: IATF ta sake duba shi
paragraphs: Muna nazarin dacewar manufa, yanayin aiki, da kuma ko aikin ya kasance a cikin aikin bude tushen jama'a.

steps.title: An ƙirƙiri wurin ajiyar jama'a
paragraphs: Idan aka karɓi aikin, ana buga shi a cikin ƙungiyar IATF GitHub a ƙarƙashin lasisin copyleft.
Wurin ajiyar ya zama gidan jama'a na lambar, batutuwa, takardu, da sakewa.

steps.title: Injiniyan da ke da alhakin ya jagoranci aikin
paragraphs: An sanya injiniyan da ke da alhakin zuwa wurin ajiyar aikin kuma ci gaba yana faruwa a bainar jama'a.

header.title: Bincika aikin da ke gudana ko fara wani aiki na musamman

paragraphs: Yi amfani da rajista don ganin abin da ya riga ya zama jama'a, ko fara shigarwa idan takamaiman matsalar samun dama ya kamata ya zama aikin.
